title: Where Farmed Aquatic Animals Are Produced
subtitle: By region and by system, 2022
description: Two facts that justify the beachhead: 70 percent of production is in Asia, and 62.6 percent of farmed aquatic animals come from inland systems — precisely the OmniDrone's environment. Building for tropical inland Asian aquaculture is building for the centre of the industry.

series.name: Regional share of aquatic animal output 2022

secondary_series.name: Inland vs marine/coastal share of farmed aquatic animals
secondary_series.note: Render as a second donut. Inland dominance is the argument for an aerial platform designed for lakes and ponds rather than offshore marine cages.

notes: Percentages sum to 99 for the regional series due to FAO rounding. Do not silently normalise to 100 — show the rounding honestly.

philippine_gap.note: A Philippine species-mix breakdown belongs here but requires the BFAR Philippine Fisheries Profile, which is NOT obtained. The webpage should render this as a labelled 'data pending' placeholder, not a fabricated pie.
